Package org.drip.historical.calibration

Calibration Instruments, Codes, and Quotes
Author:
Lakshmi Krishnamurthy
  • Class Summary
    Class Description
    DepositInstrumentSuite
    DepositInstrumentSuite contains the Configuration Settings to generate the Deposit Calibration Suite.
    FixFloatInstrumentSuite
    FixFloatInstrumentSuite contains the Configuration Settings to generate the Fix-Float Calibration Suite.
    FundingMarkSuite
    FundingMarkSuite maintains the Instrument Market Quotes used in the Funding State Construction.
    FuturesInstrumentSuite
    FuturesInstrumentSuite contains the Configuration Settings to generate the Futures Calibration Suite.
    FXForwardInstrumentSuite
    FXForwardInstrumentSuite contains the Configuration Settings to generate the FX Forward Calibration Suite.
    FXForwardMarkSuite
    FXForwardMarkSuite maintains the Instrument Market Quotes used in the FX Forward State Construction.
    GovvieInstrumentSuite
    GovvieInstrumentSuite contains the Configuration Settings to generate the Govvie Calibration Suite.
    GovvieMarkSuite
    GovvieMarkSuite maintains the Instrument Market Quotes used in the Govvie State Construction.
    InstrumentSuite
    InstrumentSuite contains the Baseline Configuration Settings to generate the Instrument Calibration Suite.
